concepts.title: Étale morphisms
concepts.blurb: Étale = smooth + unramified + flat; the algebraic analog of a local homeomorphism. Covers like z↦z^n are ramified; those like t↦t^2 on G_m (char≠2) are étale.

concepts.title: ℓ-adic cohomology
concepts.blurb: H^i_ét(X, ℤ/ℓ^n) and H^i_ét(X, ℚ_ℓ) as an inverse limit; works in characteristic p as long as ℓ≠p, and recovers classical Betti numbers for a smooth projective variety.

concepts.title: Weil conjectures and Frobenius trace
concepts.blurb: Point counts are an alternating sum of traces of Frobenius on ℓ-adic cohomology: #X(𝔽_q) = Σ (−1)^i Tr(Frob_q | H^i_ét). Eigenvalues of Frobenius lie on the circle |α|=q^{i/2} (Deligne).
